name: Bought-and-Paid-For Mayor
text:
When Bought-and-Paid-For Mayor enters the battlefield, the syndicate installs its own Mayor: you become the monarch.
Whenever Bought-and-Paid-For Mayor attacks, target opponent creates a Treasure and you create a Favor token. Campaign contributions, you understand.
flavorText: He cuts every ribbon the Don tells him to cut, and smiles for the photo.
